positive: A highly stylized, central depiction of a mythical forest creature—a bioluminescent fox spirit with ethereal fox tails and glowing antlers. The fox is leaping across a stylized mountain ridge composed of geometric jade and amethyst structures. The background is a deep indigo twilight sky filled with stylized constellations and glowing fireflies. The composition uses strong, dynamic silhouette against luminous focal points, achieving high contrast and vibrant saturation. Clean vector-art aesthetics mixed with subtle watercolor textures. Graphic novel art style, perfect for apparel printing, symmetry, clean lines, deep shadows, glowing edges. Flat composition, isolated subject, mystical, serene, majestic, vibrant cyan and gold color palette.
